text:
Found it! The issue is on line 324-336. The `loadBatchWalletTokens()` is being called whenever `address`, `batchChain`, `isConnected`, or `solanaAddress` changes. This means when you connect a wallet, it triggers this useEffect even if you're not on the Batch tab.

The toast should only show when the user is actively on the Batch Swap tab. Let me check if there's a way to detect which tab is active:
